inputs.label: Tree Diameter at Breast Height (DBH)
inputs.businessContext: Measure of tree trunk diameter at 1.3 m above ground; used in allometric equations.

label_i18n.es: Diámetro del árbol a la altura del pecho (DBH)

businessContext_i18n.en: Measure of tree trunk diameter at 1.3 m above ground; used in allometric equations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ağaç gövde çapının yerden 1,3 m yükseklikte ölçümü; allometrik denklemlerde kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Messung des Stammdurchmessers in 1,3 m Höhe; wird in allometrischen Gleichungen verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure du diamètre du tronc à 1,3 m au-dessus du sol ; utilisé dans les équations allométriques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medida del diámetro del tronco del árbol a 1.3 m sobre el suelo; se utiliza en ecuaciones alométricas.

inputs.label: Tree Height
inputs.businessContext: Total tree height; key variable in biomass estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total tree height; key variable in biomass estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam ağaç boyu; biyokütle tahmininde anahtar değişken.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Baumhöhe; Schlüsselvariable bei der Biomasse-Schätzung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur totale de l'arbre ; variable clé dans l'estimation de la biomasse.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura total del árbol; variable clave en la estimación de biomasa.

inputs.label: Wood Density
inputs.businessContext: Oven-dry wood density; varies by species; affects biomass calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Oven-dry wood density; varies by species; affects biomass calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fırında kuru odun yoğunluğu; türe göre değişir; biyokütle hesaplamasını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ofentrockene Holzdichte; variiert je nach Art; beeinflusst die Biomasseberechnung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du bois anhydre ; varie selon l'espèce ; affecte le calcul de la biomasse.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad de la madera seca al horno; varía según la especie; afecta el cálculo de biomasa.

inputs.label: Number of Trees
inputs.businessContext: Number of trees in the plot or stand for total biomass.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of trees in the plot or stand for total biomass.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parsel veya meşceredeki toplam biyokütle için ağaç sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Bäume in der Parzelle oder im Bestand für die Gesamtbiomasse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'arbres dans la parcelle ou le peuplement pour la biomasse totale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de árboles en la parcela o rodal para biomasa total.

inputs.label: Carbon Fraction of Biomass
inputs.businessContext: Default 0.47 from IPCC; fraction of biomass that is carbon.

label_i18n.fr: Fraction de carbone dans la biomasse
label_i18n.es: Fracción de carbono de la biomasa

businessContext_i18n.en: Default 0.47 from IPCC; fraction of biomass that is carbon.
businessContext_i18n.tr: IPCC'den varsayılan 0,47; biyokütlenin karbon olan kısmı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardwert 0,47 vom IPCC; Anteil der Biomasse, der Kohlenstoff ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur par défaut 0,47 du GIEC ; fraction de la biomasse qui est du carbone.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor predeterminado 0.47 del IPCC; fracción de la biomasa que es carbono.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
